texto: If a woman tells a man the god favor him, everybody says she's far-minded.' The broom halted mid-sweep and the slave turned to Hild. 'But let a woman do what the gods tell her, without asking a man's permission first? Then she's possessed.' Unwen punctuated her words with her broom, jabbing it into the corner.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Rebecca Barnhouse que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “If a woman tells a man the god favor him, everybody says she's far-minded.' The broom halted mid-…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, gender, women-and-men, com foco em termino e women-and-men.
